title: Carrot on a Stick Optimization│胡蘿蔔釣竿優化
description: Tired of your carrot on a stick breaking too fast? This datapack makes it more durable for longer pig-riding adventures!│厭倦了胡蘿蔔釣竿很快就壞掉？這個資料包讓它變得更耐用，騎豬冒險更持久！
body:
**⚠️ This data pack requires the server-side mod [Item Components](https://modrinth.com/mod/item-components).│該資料包需要伺服器端模組[物品組件](https://modrinth.com/mod/item-components)。 ⚠️**
# Function│功能
The carrot on a stick now has a max durability of 64.│現在，胡蘿蔔釣竿的最大耐久度是64。
